title: magnolia × mirifolia
intro: Magnolia × mirifolia, also known as the bay magnolia or southern bay magnolia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Magnolia virginiana and Magnolia grandiflora. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia × mirifolia include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these benefits. Herbal preparations of Magnolia × mirifolia include tea, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
